paper.title_en: Classification of connected étale algebras in multiplicity-free modular fusion categories at rank six
paper.abstract_en: We classify connected étale algebras $A$'s in multiplicity-free modular fusion categories (MFCs) $\mathcal{B}$'s at rank six, namely $\text{rank}(\mathcal{B})=6$. There are eight MFCs in total and the result indicates that only $so(5)_2$ has nontrivial connected étale algebra. We briefly mention anyon condensation as it is used to determine the category of right $A$-modules in $so(5)_2$. Finally, we discuss physical applications, specifically proving spontaneous $\mathcal{B}$-symmetry breaking (SSB) of these MFCs. The discussion also includes predicting ground state degeneracies and SSB in massive renormalization group flows from two non-unitary minimal models.
paper.journal_ref: Advances in Theoretical and Mathematical Physics 30 (2026), no. 4, 1193-1229

reasons: 未达到主题关键词门槛
